source_method: Short directed FDir LineStrings generated from mapped OSM/official waterway geometry. Krishna, reservoir and Budameru polygon arrows are west-to-east review arrows; OSM Budameru and canal arrows follow OSM line direction rules documented in the source metadata.
caveat: These are direction-review arrows for stakeholder visualization and QA. They are not terrain-gradient arrows and are not a replacement for official gate/operation records.
